svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="H5zTyWiNeiBNcIV8OCwT" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-489" dy="-174" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="Mixture of Experts (MoE) Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="620" x="100" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="input" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;" value="Input Token Representation
(from previous layer)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="230" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="router" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;" value="Router / Gating Network
(Sparse Softmax Top-K)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="200" x="230" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="expert1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Expert 1
FFN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="80" x="40" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="expert2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Expert 2
FFN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="80" x="150" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="expert3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;strokeWidth=3;" value="Expert 3
FFN
(ACTIVE)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="80" x="260" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="expert4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Expert 4
FFN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="80" x="370" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="expert5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;strokeWidth=3;" value="Expert 5
FFN
(ACTIVE)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="80" x="480" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="expert6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Expert 6
FFN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="80" x="590" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="expert7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Expert 7
FFN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="80" x="700" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="expert8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Expert 8
FFN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="80" x="810" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="weighted_sum" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;" value="Weighted Sum of Active Expert Outputs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="280" x="230" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="output" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;" value="Output
(to next layer)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="150" x="295" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="re1" edge="1" parent="1" source="router" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;dashed=1;" target="expert1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="re2" edge="1" parent="1" source="router" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;dashed=1;" target="expert2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="re3" edge="1" parent="1" source="router" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" target="expert3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="re4" edge="1" parent="1" source="router" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;dashed=1;" target="expert4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="re5" edge="1" parent="1" source="router" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" target="expert5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="re6" edge="1" parent="1" source="router" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;dashed=1;" target="expert6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="re7" edge="1" parent="1" source="router" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;dashed=1;" target="expert7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="re8" edge="1" parent="1" source="router" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;dashed=1;" target="expert8"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ae3" edge="1" parent="1" source="expert3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" target="weighted_sum"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ae5" edge="1" parent="1" source="expert5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" target="weighted_sum"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="main1" edge="1" parent="1" source="input" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeWidth=2;" target="router"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="main2" edge="1" parent="1" source="weighted_sum" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeWidth=2;" target="output"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="info" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fillColor=#d5e8d4;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=1;fontStyle=2;fontSize=11;" value="Mixtral 8x7B: 8 experts, 2 active per token
Total params: 47B | Active params: ~13B per forward pass" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="540" x="150" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_active" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=3;fontStyle=2;" value="Active Expert (Top-K selected)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="200" x="150" y="585" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_inactive" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=2;" value="Inactive Expert (skipped)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="200" x="390" y="585" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
